events.name: sessionStart
events.when: La primera reproducciÃ³n de contenido dispara contentFirstPlay y el tracker emite los beacons de inicio /start y /joinTime

events.name: sessionPause
events.when: El player entra en pausa y el tracker emite beacon /pause

events.name: sessionResume
events.when: La reproducciÃ³n se reanuda tras una pausa y el tracker emite beacon /resume

events.name: adBreakStart
events.when: adsContentPauseRequested activa el modo de ad break y el tracker abre contexto de ads

events.name: adBreakStop
events.when: adsContentResumeRequested cierra el ad break y el tracker reanuda la sesiÃ³n de contenido

events.name: bufferStart
events.when: El player entra en buffering durante reproducciÃ³n normal

events.name: bufferEnd
events.when: El player recupera reproducciÃ³n tras buffering

events.name: errorReport
events.when: El player emite error fatal y el tracker reporta el fallo al SDK

events.name: sessionStop
events.when: El player hace destroy() o cambia a nuevo contenido con restart de sesiÃ³n

events.name: skip
events.when: El usuario salta un anuncio skippable y el tracker reporta el skip event

api_contracts.signature: init(options: { accountCode?: string, id: string, type: string, metadata?: object, appName?: string }): void
api_contracts.expected_behavior: Si accountCode existe, instancia NpawPlugin y registra adapters de contenido y ads. Si falta accountCode, retorna sin efecto y no produce beacons.
api_contracts.error_behavior: Errores de inicializaciÃ³n del SDK se absorben y no deben romper la reproducciÃ³n.

api_contracts.expected_behavior: Cierra la sesiÃ³n previa y crea una nueva cuando cambian id, type o accountCode. La reinicializaciÃ³n es diferida con setTimeout(0).
api_contracts.error_behavior: Si el SDK ya fue destruido, el restart no debe lanzar excepciÃ³n.

api_contracts.expected_behavior: Actualiza metadata y opciones de video sin reiniciar sesiÃ³n cuando id, type y accountCode permanecen iguales.
api_contracts.error_behavior: No-op si el plugin o el adapter todavÃ­a no existen.

api_contracts.expected_behavior: Remueve listeners y adapters de NPAW, cierra la sesiÃ³n y deja de emitir beacons.
api_contracts.error_behavior: No debe propagar errores del SDK al player.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: tracking.youbora ausente no activa el plugin
acceptance_criteria.given: La config del player no contiene metadata.player.tracking.youbora
acceptance_criteria.when: El player carga y reproduce contenido
acceptance_criteria.then: No se emiten beacons NPAW ni se inicializa el tracker Youbora.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: enabled=true pero account_code ausente no genera beacons
acceptance_criteria.given: metadata.player.tracking.youbora.enabled=true sin account_code
acceptance_criteria.then: El plugin no produce beacons de sesiÃ³n y la reproducciÃ³n continÃºa normal.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: La primera reproducciÃ³n crea sesiÃ³n de contenido
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora activa con account_code vÃ¡lido
acceptance_criteria.then: Se observan beacons de inicio de sesiÃ³n como /start y /joinTime con metadata de contenido.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Pausa y reanudaciÃ³n generan beacons de estado
acceptance_criteria.given: SesiÃ³n de Youbora activa durante reproducciÃ³n
acceptance_criteria.when: El usuario pausa y luego reanuda
acceptance_criteria.then: Se emiten beacons /pause y /resume sin reiniciar la sesiÃ³n.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Ad break no mezcla tracking de contenido
acceptance_criteria.given: Pre-roll activo con Youbora habilitado
acceptance_criteria.then: El tracker separa el ad break del tracking de contenido y reanuda la sesiÃ³n correctamente al finalizar el break.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: load() con nuevo contenido reinicia la sesiÃ³n
acceptance_criteria.given: SesiÃ³n Youbora activa para un contenido
acceptance_criteria.when: Se llama player.load() con un contenido distinto
acceptance_criteria.then: La sesiÃ³n anterior se cierra y la nueva carga produce beacons de inicio para el nuevo contenido.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: load() con el mismo contenido no reinicia la sesiÃ³n
acceptance_criteria.given: SesiÃ³n activa con un contenido y el mismo id/type/accountCode
acceptance_criteria.when: Se vuelve a cargar el mismo contenido
acceptance_criteria.then: No aparece un beacon /stop adicional ni se reinicia la sesiÃ³n Youbora.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: destroy() antes de contentFirstPlay no inicia sesiÃ³n
acceptance_criteria.given: El player estÃ¡ listo pero todavÃ­a no empezÃ³ la reproducciÃ³n
acceptance_criteria.then: No aparecen beacons /start ni /joinTime y el teardown no rompe la app.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.then:
Suite behavior: Regardless of pre-roll Ads a View must be opened in the NPAW suite when the <play> button is clicked or the content autoplays.

Requests received: A /start or /init request is sent at the very beginning (Regardless of whether the content has pre-roll Ads or not), followed by ad requests in the case of ads.

Exceptions: If the /init request has been sent, /start request is sent close to /jointime request

Warning: Whenever a new video is played, if a video was already playing, the old View must be correctly closed with /stop, and no requests should continue being sent in that same View.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.then: /start (and/or /init) request is sent to NPAW suite when playback begins.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Enable the AdBlocker extension
2. Play any video
acceptance_criteria.then: NPAW requests are not blocked by AdBlocker - player continues operating without tracking errors.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Select a different video content while the first one is playing
acceptance_criteria.then: Old view is closed with /stop. New view is opened with /start for the new content.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: UI doesn't allow to select a different content while one is being reproduced. | LIMITATION: Plataforma tiene restriccion UI que impide testear directamente.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any content
2. Let it end organically
3. The content ends and the next content plays automatically
acceptance_criteria.then: Old view closed with /stop. New view opened with /start for the next content.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video and seek almost until the end
2. Let the video end then replay it without reloading the page
acceptance_criteria.then: Current view is closed with /stop event and a new view is created on replay.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: When we click on replay the content starts again, the current view is closed with /stop event and a new view is created.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Environments where there are more than one player
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.when: 1. Start 2 plays with 2 players at the same time
acceptance_criteria.then: 2 different views are open in NPAW Suite Tracking section
acceptance_criteria.notes: N/A: No aplica para este deployment / feature no disponible en Caracol TV.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Place the app or browser in the background
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: START and /init.
acceptance_criteria.when: 1. Play any video and put the application to the background (e.g. by pressing 'Home' button)
acceptance_criteria.then:
3 acceptable scenarios:
Scenario 1: Current View is closed - /stop is sent and new View is open when going back to foreground
Scenario 2: Content is paused - /pause fired and /ping events keep view alive. After opening app, video resumes and /resume is fired
Scenario 3: View closed on background, user returns to last menu position - no new View opened.
Picture-In-Picture: When PIP is active the view should remain open.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: Scenario 1 happening.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: INFORMATION/METADATA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: JOINTIME.
acceptance_criteria.when: 1. Play any video and wait until playback starts
acceptance_criteria.then:
/joinTime request sent when video starts reproducing.
joinDuration parameter from /joinTime corresponds to time player spends to start playing.
playhead value coherent with position when content started.
/joinTime: playhead (seconds), joinDuration (milliseconds)

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: JOINTIME.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Select any video to be played
2. Exit/close the player before the video starts to play (before /joinTime is sent)
acceptance_criteria.then:
View closed as EBVS in NPAW Suite Tracking section.
/init or /start sent, /stop sent. /joinTime NOT sent.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: BUFFER/SEEK.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video and restrict network conditions during the playback
2. Wait until the player starts buffering
3. Restore the network to normal condition/speed
acceptance_criteria.then:
Buffer event shown in NPAW Suite.
/bufferUnderrun request sent when buffering ends and playback resumes (1 event only).
bufferDuration parameter corresponds to actual buffering time in milliseconds.
playhead parameter relates to position where buffer ends.

/bufferUnderrun: bufferDuration (ms), playhead (seconds)
/ping while buffering: bufferDuration (ms), playhead (seconds)
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: /bufferUnderrun event generated, but playhead reported as 0.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: BUFFER/SEEK.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Seek to an unloaded content position using available buttons, clicking on time bar, or dragging the playhead
acceptance_criteria.then:
/seek event shown in Youbora View Detailed Tracking section.
/seek request sent with coherent seekDuration.
/bufferUnderrun NOT sent after seek (unless that's how the player works).

/seek: seekDuration (ms), playhead (seconds)
/ping while seeking: seekDuration (ms), playhead (seconds)

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Seeking to an already loaded content position
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: BUFFER/SEEK.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Seek to an already loaded content position
acceptance_criteria.then: /seek event handled correctly. Playhead updates to new position without triggering buffer.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PAUSE/RESUME.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video and pause the playback
2. After a few seconds or a few /pings resume the video.
acceptance_criteria.then:
Pause event shown in NPAW Suite / /pause request sent.
Resume event with coherent pauseDuration / /resume request sent.
pauseDuration corresponds to actual pause duration.
Playhead does not progress until content is resumed.
/bufferUnderrun NOT sent (except for Live content edge cases).

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.then: /ping requests sent every 5 seconds (unless set differently for the account). /pings sent until /stop is sent for that view.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any video, force pause, seek, buffer...
acceptance_criteria.then: playhead parameter from /ping request corresponds to current content position in seconds. Increases while content advances, stays constant during ads, pause, and buffering.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.then:
pingTime and diffTime parameters from /ping correspond to estimated time between /ping requests.
pingTime (seconds), diffTime (milliseconds).
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: diffTime reported as lower than 4 seconds.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Bitrate/totalBytes - only one can be reported
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Change network conditions (throttle) to force bitrate changes
acceptance_criteria.then:
bitrate parameter from /ping corresponds to real bitrate in use. -1 if player doesn't report bitrate.
Alternatively, totalBytes reported for transferred data; avg bitrate calculated from this.
Both parameters must NOT be sent simultaneously - only one.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: Bitrate value reported as -1.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Change network conditions (throttle) to force rendition changes
acceptance_criteria.then:
When rendition changes, entities parameter of first /ping after rendition change contains JSON with 'rendition' field. All rendition changes shown in NPAW Suite SmartTracking section.
Format: resolution@bitrate (e.g. 1920x720@900kbps)

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Use the dedicated player buttons to change resolution manually
acceptance_criteria.then:
After quality change, player does one of:
- Close current view with /stop and open new view with new quality with /start
- Send entities parameter with updated value in following /ping

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.then: throughput parameter from /ping corresponds to real network throughput. -1 if player doesn't report it.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: throughput reported as -1.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.then:
playrate parameter from /ping corresponds to real playback speed.
0 when paused or buffering.
1 when playing normally.
0.5, 2, 3, etc. when playback speed is changed.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: PING/bitrate/rendition.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any video, change option to reflect information update
acceptance_criteria.then: Updated info reported in rendition section of Detailed View. 'entities' parameter with corresponding info reported in /ping request.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: STOP.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any video and let it end naturally (seek near end then let it finish)
acceptance_criteria.then: Current view is closed in NPAW Suite Tracking section. /stop request sent when content ends. Stop event shown in Youbora View Detailed SmartTracking section.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Video changed by user interaction (available buttons, using UI)
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: STOP.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any video and select a different content to be played
acceptance_criteria.then: First view is closed in NPAW Suite Tracking section. /stop request sent when new video is selected.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Observacion Caracol TV: UI doesn't allow to select a different content while one is being reproduced. | LIMITATION: Plataforma tiene restriccion UI que impide testear directamente.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Video changed without user interaction (when next episode auto-plays)
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: STOP.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any episode from a series and let it end naturally
acceptance_criteria.then: First view is closed in NPAW Suite Tracking section. /stop request sent when new video starts.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: STOP.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Exit the video using stop/X button, back button or any available button
acceptance_criteria.then: Current view is closed in NPAW Suite Tracking section. When player is closed, no more /ping requests sent.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: STOP.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any video and start casting during a playback on the sender device
acceptance_criteria.then: Current view is closed in NPAW Suite Tracking section. No more /ping requests sent. If set manually, 'casted' parameter reported with /stop.
acceptance_criteria.notes: N/A: No aplica para este deployment / feature no disponible en Caracol TV.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ERROR.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Add media resource/manifest host to blacklist or redirect it to non-existing one
2. Play any video
acceptance_criteria.then:
1. View with error status opened in NPAW Suite with corresponding error msg and code. /error request sent with device and content info.
2. For fatal error: view closed with /stop.
3. If player retries: new view opened with corresponding events (/joinTime if success, /error if another error). No infinite error loop.
errorCode and msg/errorMsg reported.
acceptance_criteria.notes: N/A: No aplica para este deployment / feature no disponible en Caracol TV.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ERROR.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Restrict network conditions so the player cannot load the video
2. Play any video
acceptance_criteria.then: /error request sent with errorCode and message. View closed with /stop after fatal error. No infinite error reporting.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: In-Stream Error by blocking video chunks host
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ERROR.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Add media resource host to blacklist or redirect to non-existing one
2. Play any video
acceptance_criteria.then: /error request sent during playback with errorCode and message. View closed with /stop for fatal errors.
acceptance_criteria.notes: N/A: No aplica para este deployment / feature no disponible en Caracol TV.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ERROR.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Restrict the network condition during playback
acceptance_criteria.then: /error request sent with errorCode and message. View closed with /stop for fatal errors.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ERROR.
acceptance_criteria.when:
1. Play any video
2. Turn off network connection
acceptance_criteria.then: /error request sent with errorCode and message. View closed with /stop for fatal errors.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: A new View is created after an error
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ERROR.
acceptance_criteria.when: Once a video has an error, play another content from the app without reloading the page/app.
acceptance_criteria.then: New view opened in NPAW Suite SmartTracking section when next content starts. /start request sent (regardless of pre-roll Ads, /start must be sent at the very beginning).

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.when: A view is started and the first ad is about to play
acceptance_criteria.then: /adManifest request is sent when the plugin receives an answer from the ad server or first ad is about to play or error has been sent for the ad.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adBreakStart requests are sent for all ad breaks (pre, mid or post) once the ad break starts

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adBreakStop request is sent when last ad of the break ends and video content resumes or starts (unless its post-roll)
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adInit request is sent when the plugin doesn't have all the mandatory information in order to open a new view (e.g. missing mediaAdResource or adTitle, mediaAdDuration). When all this information has been retrieved, the plugin sends start event with all of the information.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adStart request is sent for the current view. It is sent after the /start request. If the /adInit request has not been sent, /adStart request is sent at the very beginning. The ads appear in the SmartAds module of NPAW Suite's View Detailed of SmartTracking section in the same order in which they have been shown.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adJoin request is sent when 1st frame of the ads is shown on the screen and ad starts to play. The adJoinDuration parameter from /adJoin is sent correctly. This duration corresponds with the time the player spends to play the ads.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: ADS REPORTING.
acceptance_criteria.when: Play any video that will start with pre-roll ads
acceptance_criteria.then:
Make sure the pre-roll ad is not included in joinDuration of /joinTime event.
CSAI (Customer Side Ads Insertion): /joinTime is sent after the pre-roll /adBreakStop.
SSAI (Server Side Ads Insertion): /joinTime is sent before the ad starts and before the pre-roll /adBreakStart.
Note: Some server side ads joinTime is fired before pre-roll because there is no way to identify ad or video.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.scenario: background — app placed in background while watching an ad
acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: AD Interaction.
acceptance_criteria.when: The app is put in background (browser minimized/tab changed) while watching an ad. Then open the app to continue watching the ad.
acceptance_criteria.then:
3 acceptable scenarios:
Scenario 1: Current View is closed - /stop is sent and New View is open when going back to foreground.
Scenario 2: Content is paused - /pause fired and /ping events keep view alive. After opening app, video resumes and /resume is fired.
Scenario 3: View closed on background, user returns to last menu position - no new View opened.
Picture-In-Picture: When PIP is active the view should remain open.
Ads (if app is put in background during ads): The ad continues playing. No ad requests are sent in a View here. A View is created once the ad ends, either to handle the next ad in line or the video playback requests.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: AD Interaction.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adClick and /adPause requests are sent for the current view.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: AD Interaction.
acceptance_criteria.when: The network is restricted during the advertisement. The advertisement continues playing after buffering.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adBufferUnderrun request is sent for the current view once the advertisement continues playing.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: AD Interaction.
acceptance_criteria.then: /adPause and /adResume requests are sent respectively. There is no /adBufferUnderrun request sent once the advertisement is resumed.
acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.notes: NOT_TESTED en Caracol TV 2026-04 — seccion de ads no ejecutada en ese ciclo de QA.

acceptance_criteria.given: Youbora tracker activo y configurado (accountCode valido). Seccion NPAW: AD Interaction stats.
acceptance_criteria.then: The 'quartile' parameter corresponds with the number of the current /adQuartile request sent for this ad. 1 if sent at 25%, 2 for 50% and 3 for 75%.

known_bugs.description: userType not reported in /start or /init requests

test_anti_patterns: No usar beacons exactos como conteo rÃ­gido absoluto â€” el SDK puede emitir heartbeats adicionales
No usar endpoints externos de NPAW en CI â€” siempre interceptar o validar con entorno controlado
No usar player events como sustituto de la observabilidad de NPAW
No registrar page.route() despuÃ©s de player.goto() â€” se pierden beacons de init
